title: Ballarpur Fort
tagline: Ballarpur Fort — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Ballarpur Fort (earlier called Ballarshah Fort) is an ancient fort in Chandrapur district, Maharashtra, India.
overview.description: Ballarpur Fort (earlier called Ballarshah Fort) is an ancient fort in Chandrapur district, Maharashtra, India. It is located in the Ballarpur city, on the east banks of the Wardha River.

topPlaces.name: Sasti
topPlaces.description: Sasti is a census town in Chandrapur district in the Indian state of Maharashtra.

topPlaces.name: Ballarpur
topPlaces.description: Ballarpur (formerly Balharshah) is a city and a municipal council in Chandrapur district in the state of Maharashtra, India. It is the second largest city in the district.

topPlaces.name: Erai river
topPlaces.description: Erai river (Marathi: इरई नदी) is a tributary of Wardha river and is an important river in Chandrapur district of Maharashtra. The river originates near Kasarbodi village of Chimur taluka and meets Wardha river near Hadasti village.

topPlaces.name: Rajura
topPlaces.description: Rajura is a town and municipal council district of the Indian state of Maharashtra.

items.note: Sasti is a census town in Chandrapur district in the Indian state of Maharashtra.
Ballarpur (formerly Balharshah) is a city and a municipal council in Chandrapur district in the state of Maharashtra, India. It is the second largest city in the district.

Erai river (Marathi: इरई नदी) is a tributary of Wardha river and is an important river in Chandrapur district of Maharashtra. The river originates near Kasarbodi village of Chimur taluka and meets Wardha river near Hadasti village.
Rajura is a town and municipal council district of the Indian state of Maharashtra.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ballarpur Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ballarpur Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Ballarpur Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar International Airport, Nagpur (141 km) and the nearest railway station is Nagpur Junction (147 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ballarpur Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ballarpur Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ballarpur Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Ballarpur Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Ballarpur Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Sasti, Ballarpur, Erai river, Rajura.
